'''Sol Mon''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and the leader of a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] gang that rose to power during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] fragmentation following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. He engaged in several trips across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], acquiring a fleet of small, black-market-modified [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and the pirates to crew them.

He was hired by [[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] to raid various cargo transports, both those of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the Empire. Sol Mon fled from Grappa after [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] uncovered Grappa's treachery.
